description: Inventory of community-authored Qiskit v2.x (C1000-179) practice exams reviewed by CertiQ. Attribution is by the public GitHub/site identity. Constructive review; repo-only. Most repos carry no license — treat question text as all-rights-reserved and quote minimally.

entries.author: clausia
entries.notes: 50-question single/select-all exam (practice-exam-1.md) with a separate answer-key-1.md. Broad syllabus coverage, many code snippets. VALIDATED (slug: clausia).

entries.author: Seattle Quantum Computing Meetup
entries.notes: Meetup prep bundle: a sample-exam PDF (+ .docx) plus notebooks including qiskit_dev_cert_exam_with_code_answers.ipynb and study-session notebooks. Primary exam artifact is a PDF, so not cleanly machine-parseable.

entries.author: Rishab Ghosh
entries.notes: QiskitPracticeExam.pdf submitted as an Advocate 2025 assignment. PDF-only; contents not parsed.

entries.author: Quantum Tokyo (community)
entries.notes: Eight per-section MyST/Jupyter notebooks rendered to a web page (quantum-tokyo.github.io/qiskit-certification-prep). Section study content with embedded practice rather than a single discrete MCQ bank; credible community group; permissively licensed.

entries.author: Hicham Amer (repo now HichamAmer/Quantum)
entries.notes: The 'Qiskit v2.x Certification' folder holds Qiskit_AD.pdf inside a broader quantum-computing repo. URL owner 'HichanBen' redirects to 'HichamAmer'. PDF-only.

entries.author: Kurian Uthuppu
entries.notes: Practice_Exams/practice_exam_1.md (20 Q) with a detailed solutions/ answer key; also lab notebooks. Default branch is 'root'. VALIDATED (slug: kurian).

entries.author: rishihg
entries.notes: mock_exam.md, 25 conceptual/API questions with an inline collapsible answer grid; labeled '(Verified)'. MIT-licensed. VALIDATED (slug: rishihg).

entries.author: Luke J. Miller
entries.notes: Most-starred (16) v2.x exam. A notebook driver over per-section question banks stored as .csv/.pkl (necessary_files/, non-necessary_files/); README claims 1000+ questions with adaptive study and progress saving. Banks are machine-readable but large; not fully parsed here.

entries.author: Manuel Esparcia
entries.notes: The README.md itself is the exam: 24 '# N.' questions with A-D options. No explicit answer key found in the README. Parseable but no author-stated answers to validate against.

entries.author: Marc Jermaine Pontiveros
entries.notes: Single-page web quiz (GitHub Pages; source repo jermaine-learning-space/qiskit-v2x-certification, index.html). Interactive; questions embedded in HTML/JS.

entries.author: gnietof
entries.notes: Three markdown practice exams (exam1/2/3.md); exam1 verified at 20 questions with a collapsible 'Show answer key', so ~60 total. 4 stars. Has a LICENSE.md (GitHub reports NOASSERTION).

entries.author: Quantum Global Group
entries.notes: Commercial cert-prep landing/platform page (not an open repo). Content behind the site; treated as competitive-landscape reference, not a parseable community bank.

entries.author: QubitQuiz
entries.notes: Substack newsletter delivering quiz-style content by email/post. Not a static discrete bank; not parsed.

entries.author: Feras Shita
entries.notes: GitHub Pages web quiz (source ferasshita/qiskit-certificate-practice): section1-8 HTML pages + quiz.js. Interactive, answers checked client-side. MIT-licensed.

entries.author: lkaucic
entries.notes: Python exam GENERATOR: question banks live as structured YAML (questions/section1-8_*.yaml, each item has choices A-D + answer) and generate_quiz.py renders a LaTeX/PDF exam. YAML source is highly machine-readable (~16 Q in section 1 alone; ~8 section banks). 2 stars.

entries.author: Q-Bees
entries.notes: Qiskit-Practice-Exam.ipynb: 25 'essential-level' MCQs (one markdown cell each, inline **Answer**). Plus per-section theory/coding practice + tutorial notebooks. VALIDATED (slug: qbees).

entries.author: bs-ns
entries.notes: Two quiz notebooks: '01-easy test.ipynb' (~39 question markers) and '02-harder test.ipynb'. Answers present. Notebook structure parseable with per-notebook effort; not validated here.

entries.author: algovista-collab
entries.notes: 25_Practice_Questions.md: 25 questions with a full 'Answer Key & Thorough Explanations' section; also 8 per-section study notebooks/PDFs. 2 stars. VALIDATED (slug: algovista).

entries.author: elgeffe
entries.notes: A personal 'my-notes' branch on a fork of the official qiskit-documentation repo. Study notes, not a standalone MCQ practice exam. Inherits the docs' Apache-2.0/docs license (GitHub reports NOASSERTION).

entries.author: Adrian Panasiewicz
entries.notes: practice_exam.ipynb (~90 cells, ~24 questions with answers). Notebook parseable with per-notebook effort; not validated here.

entries.author: vantnprof
entries.notes: Practice.md: a full 68-question / 90-minute mock that mirrors the real exam format (single + select-all), with per-question collapsible answers/explanations AND a full answer-key table. Very well-formed. VALIDATED (slug: vantnprof).

entries.author: Marco Barroca
entries.notes: notebooks/qiskit_v2_mock_exam.ipynb: 68-question mock with collapsible answers, per-choice explanations, and IBM docs reference links; optional scratch code cells. MIT-licensed. VALIDATED (slug: marcobarroca).

entries.author: SKupisz
entries.notes: questions.ipynb (26 cells) mock test. Structure less regular (few explicit answer markers found); count/answers uncertain. 1 star. Not validated here.
